untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) Order book depth depletion monitoring (>40% of typical depth) — not available in price/technical indicators; (2) Bid-ask spread percentile ranking — only bandwidth available, not spread percentile; (3) One-sided volume detection — vol_ratio_20 measures overall volume ratio, not directional order book imbalance. These microstructure conditions require Level 2/3 order book data not present in allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy mapping: price_pos_20 approximates price deviation from 20-day MA in standard deviations; bb_bandwidth approximates spread widening; vol_ratio_20 approximates volume surge. However, the core signal depends on order book microstructure (depth depletion, bid-ask spread percentiles, one-sided liquidity exhaustion) which cannot be derived from OHLCV price action alone. A proper implementation requires Level 2 order book data, order flow imbalance metrics, or custom liquidity depth indicators.
